regional_cost_note: Roofers in Auckland typically charge $150–$400/m² for a full re-roof (materials + labour). A standard 3-bedroom house re-roof costs $15,000–$25,000. Always verify LBP and RANZ membership.

businesses.name: Axiom Roofing
businesses.known_for: 97.7% NoCowboys rating; exclusively uses NZ-made roofing products; full residential and commercial re-roofing.

businesses.name: Johnson Roofing
businesses.known_for: Genuine 24/7 emergency response across Auckland from Orewa to Manukau; specialists in leak detection and urgent repairs.

businesses.name: WE ROOF LTD
businesses.known_for: 10-year workmanship warranty on all new installations plus NZ COLORSTEEL manufacturer warranty up to 50 years.

businesses.name: Solution Roofing Auckland
businesses.known_for: Professional crew that shows up on time; praised for communication, tidy sites, and quality materials.

businesses.name: Auckland Roofing Solutions
businesses.known_for: Full residential roofing service; re-roofing, repairs, guttering and spouting across greater Auckland.

businesses.name: Dynamic Roofing Auckland
businesses.known_for: Long-run iron specialists; competitive pricing for re-roofs across West and South Auckland.
